title: Lamb Skewers with Middle Eastern Flair
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish showcasing the beauty of grilled lamb skewers, seasoned with a blend of Middle Eastern spices and herbs.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flaky, syrian, and a pinch of black pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat evenly.
Thread the lamb onto the skewers, leaving a small space between each cube.
Brush the skewers with syrian and place on the grill.
Grill for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the lamb reaches an internal temperature of 145°F (63°C).
Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley and a side of your favorite Middle Eastern condiments.
